title: calamintha fenzlii
intro: Calamintha fenzlii, also known as Fenzli's calamintha or mountain mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of calamintha fenzlii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, relieve stress and anxiety, and even help alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis. Calamintha fenzlii can be used to make various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its benefits.
